description_long: This warehouse features a traditional timber-framed design with cream-colored stucco infill panels and dark wooden beams forming geometric patterns across the exterior walls. The structure consists of a main rectangular building with a prominent, tall square tower on one end, both topped with steeply pitched, gray shingle roofs. The entrance is marked by a gabled porch with a wooden door, and the lower portion of the walls is clad in vertical wooden planks. The rooflines are sharply defined, and the overhanging eaves add depth to the silhouette. No windows or external signage are visible, giving the building a utilitarian yet historic appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and ample interior storage space.
description: A timber-framed warehouse with cream stucco panels, dark wooden beams, and steep gray shingle roofs, featuring a tall tower and a gabled entrance porch.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a gabled porch, the tall tower to the left, and the intersecting rooflines.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the tower and the full gabled end of the main building, with the porch roof visible in the foreground.
description_view_2: The rear side displays the long expanse of the main building and the tower, emphasizing the timber framing and roof overhangs.
description_view_3: The side view focuses on the height of the tower and the shorter main building, with the porch and entrance less visible.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a prominent timber frame with diagonal and vertical wooden beams over cream stucco panels, a gabled entrance porch with a wooden door, and a base clad in vertical wooden planks. The design is geometric and symmetrical, with no visible windows or decorative elements.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is steeply pitched and covered with gray shingles, with the main building and tower each having their own gabled roof. The eaves are slightly overhanging, and there are no visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
